title: phegopteris alpestris
intro: Phegopteris alpestris, also known as the mountain polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Phegopteris alpestris include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and other muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of Phegopteris alpestris can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including high blood pressure, bronchitis, and digestive problems.
